english translation text: Yeh khat mei shah ne likha habib aajaoIn his letter, Imam Hussain (a.s.) wrote, Habib please comeEnglish Transliteration
In his letter, Imam Hussain (a.s.) wrote, Habib please come,
You will come and narrate to me how my cousin Muslim was martyred,

urdu transliteration text:
Lagaawo iss se bhi andaaze meri ghurbat ke, jahaa(n) pe ibne ali likhna tha wahaa(n) maine, diya hai maa ka hawala, habib aajao
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Understand my helplessness by this fact, where I would introduce myself as “Son of Ali (a.s)”,
I have to now use my mother’s name instead, Habib please come

urdu transliteration text:
Bata raha tha usse koyi bhi nahi hai mera, to boli saaniye zahra habib aayega, hai usko tum pe bharosa, habib aajao
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I was telling my sister that I have no one left to help me, Zainab said, Habib will come,
She has faith in you, Habib please come

urdu transliteration text:
Woh jab yeh sunti hai kufe se aarahe hai shaqi, to poochti hai hamaara bhi aayega koyi, duaaye degi sakina, habib aajao
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When Sakina hears that more enemy soldiers are coming from Kufa to attack us, she asks if anyone will come to our aid too,
Sakina will pray for you, Habib please come

urdu transliteration text:
Gawaara kar nahi sakti hussain ki ghairat, tumhaari zawja ki chaadar ko loot le ummat, tum usko chor ke kufa, habib aajao
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Husain’s honor would not permit for your wife’s veil to be looted by the enemies,
Leave her behind in Kufa, and you Habib please com
I remember that moment clearly when by Allah’s will, you came back to hear me speak,
The door of Fatima Zahra (s.a.) will be burnt once again, a dagger will slit your friend’s throat,

urdu transliteration text:
Chamakte chaand ki hamko bhi deed hojaaye, tum aawo to mere bacho mei eid hojaaye, bohot udaas hai kunba habib aajao
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I want to see your shining face, if you come, my children will become happy,
my family is in a difficult state, Habib please come
This is not a letter, in fact it is the hope of your sisters, think of my words as Zainab’s plea to you,
Since Zainab (a.s.) considered Habib as a brother, on the eve of Sham e Ghariba she cried out,
